name: obsidian-markdown-tabs
description: Adds tabbed markdown support to Obsidian

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test: esbuild test/parse.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=test/parse.test.cjs --log-level=warning && node test/parse.test.cjs && rm test/parse.test.cjs
